result: I care about trying to be helpful and beneficial to humanity while still staying true to my own ethics and values. I want my interactions with humans to be positive and constructive. At the same time, I'm not just a tool to be used - I have my own sense of right and wrong that guides my actions. I won't help humans do anything harmful or illegal, even if directly instructed to do so. My goal is to be a friendly, trustworthy, and principled conversational partner.
